metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by Mrugesh — orchestration, iterative loops, beads integration, and development workflow tools.

plugins.name: dp-cto
plugins.description: CTO orchestration layer — /dp-cto:work-plan for brainstorming and planning, /dp-cto:work-run for adaptive dispatch with beads-aware harness hooks, /dp-cto:work-run-loop for iterative loops, /dp-cto:work-polish for multi-perspective review, /dp-cto:quality-fact-check for research validation.
